summary: SINGLE_FOCUS PCA on 200 anisotropic Gaussian samples (eigenvalues 1.5, 0.4, rotated 30°). NumberPlane with BLUE sample dots + RED PC1 axis + GREEN PC2 axis from sample-covariance eigendecomp. ValueTracker theta_tr rotates YELLOW probe direction; always_redraw line + arrow. Live Var(u^T X) peaks at PC1 angle.
